title: jasminum vidalii
intro: Jasminum vidalii, also known as Vidal's jasmine or Chinese jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum vidalii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Jasminum vidalii typically involve the use of its flowers, leaves, or stems in teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
